series_metadata.series_description: The Payroll Records contain payroll information for BWC employees such as donated leave requests, overtime (OT) forms, off-cycle paychecks, reversal or return of direct deposit requests, manual/additional pays, and miscellaneous emails from employees regarding time keeping changes (i.e., RFL type, comp vs. OT, etc).

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: Scan original document into J: drive (Payroll), verify scanned image is readable, and ; Electronic: one (1) year, provided audited by Auditor of State, audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved, and
